privileged_info_summary: The sales_report.xlsx file contains real US Federal Reserve Economic Data (FRED) series MRTSSM448USS - monthly retail sales for Clothing and Clothing Accessories Stores (NAICS 448) measured in millions of dollars, seasonally adjusted. Data spans 95 months from January 2018 through November 2025. The file was generated by fetching actual FRED data via the official API (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/graph/fredgraph.csv?id=MRTSSM448USS) and loading it into Excel format. Column E contains Revenue values with 93 entries greater than 10,000 and 1 entry less than 5,000, meeting the task's conditional formatting requirements. The data is sourced from the U.S. Census Bureau via the Federal Reserve Economic Data platform.
